items.title: Gus Lamont's grandmother denies involvement in disappearance

children.content: One of the grandmothers of missing four-year-old Gus Lamont says police have a theory that she buried her grandson after an accident — an allegation she describes as "ludicrous".

items.title: Delays to alcohol delivery restrictions worry SA anti-violence advocates

children.content: Family violence prevention advocates say the SA government has yet to progress alcohol delivery legislation as recommended by last year's Royal Commission into Domestic, Family and Sexual Violence.

items.title: Thunderbirds first team through to Super Netball Grand Final

children.content: The Adelaide Thunderbirds are through to their third Super Netball grand final in four years. Now they wait to see if they will face the Melbourne Vixens or West Coast Fever for a shot at the title.

image.altText: Players hug and smile as they celebrate in a huddle

items.title: Pitched as an outback oasis, this remote town is 'actually reinventing itself'

items.title: Russian timber getting into Australia by exploiting loopholes, industry says

children.content: Russian imports have faced tariffs since the start of the war in Ukraine, but timber is being rerouted through third countries and is entering Australia.

items.title: 'Tony Modra is awake': Ricciuto describes optimism for star's recovery

items.title: Why these retirees won't give up the 3:30am starts and 14-hour shifts

items.title: Multiple SA voters who 'definitely voted' surprised by failure to vote notices

children.content: Multiple voters have received notices from the Electoral Commission of South Australia informing them they will be fined for not voting in the state election, despite having voted.

items.title: Inquest to probe Adelaide fashion icon's death after using magic mushrooms

articles.title: The most culturally diverse World Cup ever meets Trump's America

items.title: Green drought like 'trying to live on watermelon' for livestock

items.title: Signs of life in Ningaloo Reef's baby coral after damaging year
